description_long: This is a round, hand-tossed pizza with a golden-brown, slightly puffy crust and a visibly uneven edge, suggesting an artisanal preparation. The surface is generously covered with melted mozzarella cheese, which has browned in spots, and is interspersed with slices of tomato and scattered green herbs, likely basil or spinach. The cheese appears to be the dominant topping, with the tomatoes providing a contrasting red hue and the herbs adding a touch of green. The pizza is cut into several slices, as indicated by the visible cut lines radiating from the center. The crust is thicker at the edge and tapers toward the center, with some air bubbles visible in the dough. There is no visible packaging or branding present, and the pizza is shown directly on a neutral background.
description: A round, hand-tossed pizza with a golden-brown crust, topped with melted cheese, tomato slices, and green herbs. The pizza is sliced and has a rustic, artisanal appearance.
description_view_0: This view shows the pizza from a slightly angled side, highlighting the puffy, uneven crust and the distribution of cheese, tomato, and herbs.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the front crust, which appears slightly thicker and more bubbled, with visible cut lines and toppings spread across the surface.
description_view_2: Here, the pizza's left side crust is more prominent, and the toppings are seen more toward the center, with the herbs and cheese well distributed.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the opposite side, showing the thickest crust bubbles and a clear view of the cheese and tomato arrangement.
